name: Buffalo Golf House
address: 1242 Niagara Falls Blvd, Tonawanda Town, NY 14150
about: Buffalo Golf House is a premier indoor golf facility in Tonawanda, NY, offering a high-end golf experience year-round. The venue features five private rooms equipped with Full Swing Golf Pro 2.0 simulators, allowing players to experience over 80 championship courses worldwide. Members enjoy 24/7 access to the facility, discounted simulator rates of $40 per hour, and free unlimited access to the 2,000 sq ft Putt/Chip Green, while non-members pay $55 per hour for simulator time during business hours.
why_golfers_like_it: PGA-endorsed Full Swing Pro 2.0 simulator technology with dual tracking for accurate ball flight
24/7 member access and free unlimited use of the state-of-the-art Putt/Chip Green
Ability to play on over 80 famous courses like Pebble Beach and Bandon Dunes without traveling

food_and_drink.notes: No kitchen or food service mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: PGA Endorsed, Dual Tracking Technology combining infrared with high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are encouraged to bring your own clubs for the best experience, though club rentals are available for $10 per set.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a 19th Hole Bar & Lounge, but bringing outside food and drink is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Solo Player: Approximately 1 hour. Two Players: Between 1.5 to 2 hours. Four Players: Around 3 to 3.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Not specified; the facility appears geared toward adults and serious golfers.
